assumptions (both tokens have 18 decimals, Chainlink feeds have 8 decimals):         - LTV  75 %  \u2014 max borrow relative to collateral value         - Liquidation threshold 80 % \u2014 position is liquidatable below this         - Liquidation bonus 5 % \u2014 incentive paid to liquidators on top of seized collateral         - Interest 10 % APR, accrued linearly per second         - Price staleness window: 1 hour         A simple pool model is used: external liquidity providers supply borrow tokens,         and borrowers draw from that pool.  Interest is not distributed to LPs in this         reference implementation (add a yield-sharing layer if desired).","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The caller of a function is not the expected one. 4f8335856fe9f339134b09335e9f678c377","dweb:/ipfs/QmWh6R35SarhAn4z2wH8SU456jJSYL2FgucfTFgbHJJN4E"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/interfaces/AggregatorV3Interface.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1680935541a83e42df3fe647f1445bc3588ceaeaca88d4a6bd21c91ddfa6b56f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://69239c47721d4bfc063d0c1b04d9812dd1e7d573f9458781e7148ff11619d992","dweb:/ipfs/QmcZsKi8x7qiY562Uvwe4EevXpzv7HJ5akFX4RizLBL8Pj"]},"src/lending/LendingPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0xffdb804619d8f5bf386abfa981c6d63496c9e5cc7cffaeb2a3ac4109a3201677","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fe8679cabf829491d2a8f305e7ac9d780940762af4964feba91b858a7a409424","dweb:/ipfs/QmT9jn82xSWh38yKtT5tu3naJ3NNaDVCvpuF6pEzjCmUjo"]}},"version":1}

params.amount: Amount to borrow (must not exceed LTV limit)

params._borrowFeed: Chainlink feed for borrow token (USD, 8 dec)
params._collateralFeed: Chainlink feed for collateral token (USD, 8 dec)

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

liquidate(address,uint256).details: The liquidator repays `debtAmount` of borrow tokens and receives         the equivalent value of collateral plus a 5 % bonus.

params.borrower: Address of the position to liquidate
params.debtAmount: Amount of debt the liquidator wishes to repay (capped at full debt)

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.amount: Amount to repay.  Pass `type(uint256).max` to clear the full position.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

borrow(uint256).notice: Borrows `amount` of borrowToken against deposited collateral.

depositCollateral(uint256).notice: Deposits collateral tokens into the caller's position.

healthFactor(address).notice: Returns the health factor for `user` (PRECISION = 1.0, < PRECISION = liquidatable).

maxBorrow(address).notice: Returns the maximum additional amount `user` can borrow right now.

pendingInterest(address).notice: Preview the accrued interest for `user` up to the current block.

provideLiquidity(uint256).notice: Adds borrow-side liquidity to the pool so borrowers have tokens to draw from.

repay(uint256).notice: Repays part or all of the caller's debt.

withdrawCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraws collateral, provided the position remains healthy after withdrawal.
